title: [SBW] Frontline Combat Pack
description: An addon for the superb warfare mod that introduces many new vehicles built around and for the frontline combat server and its events.
body:
An addon for the superb warfare mod that introduces many new vehicles built around and for the frontline combat server and its events.

**Currently vehicles only work using creative ammo and cannot be crafted will be fixed soon as a heads up**

list of features:

*   2 different littlebirds both an armed and unarmed version
*   1 AH-1Z Viper
*   4 different toyota technicals
*   4 different Gaz Tigrs
*   2 different Urals (GRAD Ural is still in development so is buggy)
*   1 Kamaz
*   2 different strykers both an M1126 and M1128
*   1 BMP-1

I do not check curseforge comments frequently so pls join disc server to report bugs and get a quick response

we currently strive for weekly updates so while the current content may be lacking much more is to come within the weeks

Credits For Models And Other Contributions:

*   Flaeezzz
*   ViktorNoMercy
*   Dreamse
*   IWantAShotgun
*   Roif

if you want to join the server and participate in the events: [https://discord.gg/frontlinecombat](https://discord.gg/frontlinecombat)
